verbatim_text: So what do you do? Well, you have to at least try. You will take some guesses, get some partial signal. And then critically, you will have to sit back and internalize this experience to try. Otherwise, you're just a student that's brute force hacking the autograin. So in AI terms, the first will be called search, and the second is learn. Now prior work, I've done search. Concretely, just prompting the LLM over and over again. And one example is AlphaEvo from Google DeepMind, if you have heard of it. Our work does training on the new experience from this single prompt. So how do we do it concretely? Let me use GPU kernel engineering as an example. So a test prompt would be a piece of PyPort code. You want to write a CUDA kernel that has the same functionality of this PyPort code, but it's faster.
